prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 7465→8060→6618→14481→13642，2024 年因新高考改革（文理分科→物理类/历史类）出现大幅后移，2025 年小幅回升至 13642 名，近两年基准约 13642–14481 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 42 人、2022 年 48 人、2023 年 48 人、2024 年 47 人、2025 年 56 人；2026 年计划大幅扩招至 73 人，较 2025 年增加约 30%，扩招幅度显著，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 59 名，近年排名稳定在 47–59 名区间，学校综合实力处于中上水平；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 41 位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度一般；新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A、应用经济学 A-、中国语言文学 A-、生物学 A-、药学 A-，共 6 个 A- 及以上学科，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
工科类专业（电子信息、人工智能、电气等）社会热度持续偏高；本省 2026 年考生总数约 218700 人（较 2025 年约 179817 人增加约 22%），物理类估算约 146500 人（较 2025 年 121443 人增加约 21%），考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧；2026 年；暨南大学位于广东广州，属一线城市热门地域，对西北考生有一定吸引力。
8. 【预测结论】综合 2025 年基准位次 13642 名、2026 年计划大幅扩招约 30%（缓解竞争）、本省物理类考生增加约 21%（加剧竞争）以及学校声誉平稳等因素，扩招效应略大于考生增加效应，预计位次较 2025 年小幅后移（位次数字增大，竞争略缓解）；预测最低位次约 16500 名，区间 16000–17000 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 7465→8060→6618→14481→13642. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform (division of arts and sciences into physics/history categories), there was a significant backward shift. In 2025, it slightly recovered to 13642, with the recent two-year baseline around 13642–14481. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 42 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 47 in 2024, and 56 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 73, an increase of about 30% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, approximately 59th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 47–59 range, indicating an upper-middle level of comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin heat total ranking is 41st (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is average. Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, totaling 6 A- or above disciplines, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Engineering majors (electronic information, artificial intelligence, electrical, etc.) continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in this province is approximately 218,700 (an increase of about 22% from approximately 179,817 in 2025), with the physics category estimated at about 146,500 (an increase of about 21% from 121,443 in 2025), indicating a significant expansion in examinee scale and intensified competition. In 2026; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city with a popular region, which has some appeal to northwestern examinees.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13642, the significant enrollment expansion of about 30% in 2026 (easing competition), the increase of about 21% in provincial physics category examinees (intensifying competition), and stable school reputation, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the examinee increase effect. It is expected that the ranking will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases, competition slightly eases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 16500, with a range of 16000–17000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electronic Information Engineering
- Artificial Intelligence
- Accounting.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Automation

- Financial Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Ecology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 16000–17000, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15000), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine and Electronic Information Engineering. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 17000), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for Arts/History Category approximately 1688→1050→1176→2192→2029, with a notable backward shift in 2024 due to the new college entrance exam reform, and a slight recovery to 2029 in 2025; recent two-year baseline around 2029–2192; provincial Arts/History Category enrollment plan: 25 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 23 in 2024, 19 in 2025; 2026 plan expands to 27, an increase of about 42% from 2025, a significant expansion, markedly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 59th in 2026, stable in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat total ranking 41st (relatively hot), application attention average; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, providing strong support for Arts enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Accounting, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Popular Arts majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting) have stable to slightly hot social popularity; estimated provincial History Category examinees in 2026 about 72,171 (an increase of about 24% from 58,374 in 2025), significantly expanding candidate pool, intensifying competition; 2026; Jinan University located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city with strong appeal to Arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2029, the significant enrollment expansion of about 42% in 2026 (markedly easing competition), the increase of about 24% in provincial History Category examinees (intensifying competition), and stable university reputation, the expansion effect clearly outweighs the examinee increase effect, so the ranking is expected to shift backward notably in 2026 (ranking number increases, competition eases); predicted minimum ranking approximately 2600, range 2500–2700.
